title: UK should commit to rejoin the EU, London mayor tells CNBC
summary_full: London mayor Sadiq Khan said that Prime Minister Keir Starmer should commit to rejoining the European Union and be "bigger and bolder."
summary_public: London mayor Sadiq Khan said that Prime Minister Keir Starmer should commit to rejoining the European Union and be "bigger and bolder."

GB.label: negative
GB.evidence: UK should commit to rejoin the EU, London mayor tells CNBC
